titles.title: Blessed Be the Lord God Almighty

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Father in heaven, how we love you. We lift your Name in all the earth. May your kingdom, be established in our praises, As your people declare your mighty works.

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: Blessed be the Lord God Almighty Who was and is, and is, to come. Blessed be the Lord God Almighty. Who reigns forever more.
